title: 🌿 SPA RECEPTIONIST 🌿
description:
Company Overview / Employee Value Proposition

Founded in 2007, Apex Retail brings premium international skincare brands to prestigious Asian markets.

Apex Retail also prided itself in its first-class customer service with the highest customer satisfaction guaranteed. . The combination of top-quality products and customer service has brought the company to where it is today - a successful luxury beauty and skincare retailer in Asia, with over 140 employees across Singapore and Hong Kong!

Job Summary

We are looking for a friendly, professional, and customer-oriented Spa Receptionist to be the welcoming face of our spa and ensure an exceptional experience for every client.

Responsibilities

  • Greet and welcome walk-in and appointment-based customers to create a positive first impression
  • Manage appointment bookings through phone calls, messaging platforms, and in-person interactions to optimize scheduling
  • Respond to client inquiries clearly and professionally to provide accurate information and support
  • Coordinate therapists’ schedules daily to ensure smooth spa operations and timely service delivery
  • Process payments accurately and complete basic administrative tasks to support front desk efficiency
  • Maintain a clean, organized, and inviting reception area to enhance the spa environment
  • Collaborate with team members to support a relaxing and pleasant spa atmosphere for clients

Preferred competencies and qualifications

  • Proficient spoken Chinese to communicate effectively with clients who prefer this language
  • Pleasant personality demonstrated through strong communication and customer service skills in client interactions
  • Well-groomed appearance with a professional and positive attitude
  • Prior experience in customer service or the spa/beauty industry to contribute relevant knowledge and skills
  • Ability to work independently and collaboratively within a team environment

Other Information

⭐ 5-Day Work Week 💼 Stable and supportive work environment 📈 Opportunities for growth within the beauty & wellness industry 🎁 Staff benefits and incentives

  • 📍 Location: Various Outlet (Orchard area)
  • 💰 Salary: $2800
  • ⭐ Shift Work : 9.45am - 6.45pm /11.30am - 8.30pm

What are you waiting for? Click Apply to join and be a part of Singapore's TOP Leading Group!

postedCompany.description:
Founded in 2007, Apex Retail brings premium international skincare brands to prestigious Asian markets. Over the years, we expanded extensively on our product offerings, retail channels as well as our growing team to meet the ever-changing needs and demands of the market. To ensure our products and services quality, each of the brands undergoes careful selections from the most exclusive international sources for their luxurious, unique, and effective ingredients which differentiates us from our competitors. Building high-end retail concept stores at premium locations further aid in developing brand values that attract customers and their loyalty.


Apex Retail also prided itself in its first-class customer service with the highest customer satisfaction guaranteed. We house a strong team of customer service officers who specializes in handling all customer inquiries, needs, and expectations. The combination of top-quality products and customer service has brought the company to where it is today - a successful luxury beauty and skincare retailer in Asia, with over 140 employees across Singapore and Hong Kong!


We believe in establishing a long and successful journey with our team members, taking the company and each other to new heights.  Therefore, we train and support the team and make efforts to make the company a place where everyone can thrive.


What are you waiting for? Click Apply to join and be a part of Singapore's TOP Leading Retailer Group!


Would you like to hear more from us? Click on the link below:

https://www.apexretail.com.sg/get-to-know-us
